detail.description:
Welcome to Block Crush — a classic block puzzle and line-clear puzzle game built around fitting blocks, clearing full lines, and solving each board with smart spatial reasoning inspired by classic line-based block logic.

As a thoughtful brain teaser, this puzzle challenges you to think ahead, control the grid, and manage space through clean, precise block placement. Every move matters — each block changes the board, creates patterns, and opens opportunities for longer runs.

Inspired by classic
